Milestone.name: Academix v13.2 - Agentic DSS Audit Ready
Milestone.Description: Pure VBA Decision Support System for Inventory Management. Fully compiled, agentic-tested, and ready for multi-agent systems. Generic LSM core separated for public GitHub release.

Component.name: vbe.ps1
Component.desc: VBE session management and macro control

Protocol.name: handoff
Protocol.desc: VBE error → Desktop\handoffN.txt → AI fixes source → rebuild → verify

Protocol.name: build
Protocol.desc: Kill Excel → Open MASTER → Strip all → Import source → Compile → Save new

Protocol.name: clean-slate
Protocol.desc: Never modify .xlsm directly. Always fix .bas files, then rebuild.

Protocol.name: attribute-fix
Protocol.desc: Strip Attribute VB_Name from document modules during injection

Fix.desc: Strip Attribute VB_Name from ThisWorkbook.cls during injection
Move Private m_LastSyncTime declaration before Public procedures
Change CalculateAllForecasts from Function to Sub (UDT cannot be Variant)
Change Exit Sub to Exit Function in CommitTransaction
